attribution.pr: Hatched with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code) in the Coop

hooks.command: if cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE 'packages/[^/]+/\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Package-level .env files not allowed. Use root .env only.' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|] *)bun test( |$)' && ! printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE 'bun run test'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use `bun run test` not `bun test` — bun test uses the built-in runner which ignores vitest config.' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qiE 'deploy.*mainnet|vercel.*--prod'; then echo 'PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT — Requires explicit user confirmation before proceeding'; fi
CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git.*push.*--force.*(main|master)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never force push to main/master' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|] *)git commit'; then cd /Users/afo/Code/regen-coordination/coop && bun run validate quick 2>&1 | tail -10; fi; exit 0
printf '%s\n' 'Coop Claude Code' '  /plan /debug /review /audit /monitor' '  Agents: oracle | cracked-coder | code-reviewer | migration | triage'

echo '## Post-Compaction Reminders
- Use `bun run test` (NEVER `bun test`) — bun test ignores vitest config
- Single .env at root only — never create package-specific .env files
- Import from `@coop/shared` barrel only — never deep paths
- Extension is the primary product surface, app is landing/receiver
- Local-first: data stays local until explicit publish/sync
- Passkey-first: no wallet-extension-first UX
- Chain targets: Sepolia (dev), Arbitrum One (prod)'

echo '⚠️  Before finishing: did you verify your changes? Choose the right tier:
  typecheck (~10s) — single-package, no shared exports
  quick (~15s) — typecheck + lint
  smoke (~1m) — cross-package changes
  build (~45s) — CSS tokens, new shared exports
Run: bun run validate <tier>'

cd /Users/afo/Code/regen-coordination/coop && printf '## Session State (auto-saved %s)

' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" > session-state.md && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/- /' >> session-state.md && echo '
---
Review and update this file after compaction.' >> session-state.md
echo 'Task marked complete — ensure verification was run before reporting done to user.'
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$'; then npx @biomejs/biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(css|tsx)$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'views/'; then echo 'UI file modified — verify visually in Chrome before reporting done. Use Chrome MCP screenshot or manual check.'; fi; exit 0
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Coop"'

statusLine.command: MSGS=('All chickens roosted' 'Coop is warm' 'Eggs incubating' 'Flock assembled'); printf '%s | %s' "$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-branch')" "${MSGS[$((RANDOM % 4))]}"

tips: Use /plan for complex features, /debug for mysteries
bun run validate smoke — your pre-commit confidence check
Loose chickens = uncaptured tabs. Roost them!
Local-first: data stays local until you publish
